content: Current QLC+ documentation establishes the baseline workflow: fixture-oriented patching, fixture and group components, attribute-aware scenes, chasers and sequences, function management, configurable virtual-console buttons and sliders, MIDI and OSC mappings, I/O universes, a DMX monitor, and saved project I/O configuration. This breadth is credible table stakes, but the blank-canvas virtual console and separated editors also expose setup friction GOLC should reduce.
